## Linked work

- Roadmap item / milestone:
- IEP (required for any normative spec change):
- ADR (if this records an implementation decision):

## Definition of done (roadmap §13)

- [ ] Change is linked to a roadmap item or IEP above
- [ ] Behavior is documented; public API is typed
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] At least one valid example and one invalid/failure example (where applicable)
- [ ] Conformance suite passes (`pnpm run test:spec`)
- [ ] Full local verification passes (`pnpm run verify`)
- [ ] Documentation and examples updated
- [ ] No provider concepts introduced into the core
- [ ] No AI in the execution path
- [ ] Deterministic-behavior tests added where applicable
- [ ] Changelog entry added under `[Unreleased]`

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs extra attention: security implications, open questions, follow-ups. -->
